creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port of version 0.4 committed, thanks.  Your name has been etched in 
the Handbook for your contribution.  For some reason, the tab characters 
in your PR were changed into spaces, which required repair.  This 
was not the case in your first PR, so you may want to consider what you 
did differently that introduced the problem. :-)
